body.title: [sprint] Skills track intentions, not goals (drop G-xxx goal-tracking)
body.intention: No skill prompts for or records a G-xxx goal link; the linkage unit everywhere is the intention (the ticket `intention` field and an intention link on decisions).
body.description:
**Problem:** We are switching the tracked unit from goals to intentions (goals feel like noise; intentions are the falsifiable, ticket-level unit this design rests on). /sorted still asks 'Which goal does this serve? — G-xxx', and the emission schema carries `links.goals`. The skill layer must follow the substrate (the ticket `intention` field + `_check_intention_field` are already wired).

**Proposed shape:** Sweep skills to replace goal-tracking with intention-tracking: /sorted Step 2.6 Q1 → 'Which intention does this serve?' recorded as an intention link; decision record `## Goal Link` → `## Intention`. Stop populating `links.goals`; leave the field in-place (deprecated) for one cycle.
**Reader-safety (advisor):** before emptying `links.goals`, verify the 3 current readers tolerate empty: `devlab/claudecode/memory_emit.py`, `unseen_university/ticket_store.py`, `devices/hubert/device.py`. 'Deprecate-in-place' must not silently starve a reader (esp. rollup / intent-extractor paths).

**Affected files:** `skills/sorted/SKILL.md`, `skills/context-load/SKILL.md`, `skills/day-close/SKILL.md` (+ ~/.claude/skills mirrors) — MEDIUM inertia; the 3 reader files above (read-only verification, not necessarily edited).
**Design rules:** skills-live-in-repo; goals→intentions (this design); export-not-copy.
**Scope boundary:** IN — replace goal prompts/records with intention prompts/records across skills; verify the 3 readers tolerate empty links.goals. OUT — removing `links.goals` from the schema (deprecate-in-place this cycle); the atomicity check; historical G-xxx records (Project-Zero, leave as-is).
**Test plan:** grep skills/ for `G-xxx`, `Which goal does this serve`, `## Goal Link` → 0 live refs. Run /sorted dry → asks for an intention, records `## Intention`. Confirm the 3 readers handle empty links.goals without error.
**Completion criteria:** grep of skills/ for the goal-tracking tokens returns 0 live refs; a post-change /sorted decision record contains `## Intention` and no `## Goal Link`; the 3 readers verified non-breaking on empty links.goals.
